title: Elemental Series
description: Elemental Series est un mod pour la série Elemental qui enrichit le jeu en ajoutant les fondations essentielles et de nouvelles fonctionnalités.
body:
# 📖 What's this mod?

Elemental Series is a mod for the Elemental series that enhances the gaming experience by introducing essential elements and innovative features. This mod adds new items specifically designed for crafting complex machines and more powerful armor. These additions are intended to lay the groundwork for future mods, offering expanded possibilities and greater depth to the gameplay.

# ✅ Features:

- Adds Copper for Older Versions of Minecraft

## Gears: New gear items made from various Minecraft materials, including:

- Diamond Gear
- Emerald Gear
- Coal Gear
- Redstone Gear
- Lapis Lazuli Gear
- Copper Gear
- Netherite Gear
- Iron Gear
- Gold Gear
- Charcoal Gear

## Plates with Minecraft Materials:

- Diamond Plate
- Emerald Plate
- Coal Plate
- Redstone Plate
- Lapis Lazuli Plate
- Copper Plate
- Netherite Plate
- Iron Plate
- Gold Plate
- Charcoal Plate

## Other

- Adds nuggets for all the materials.
- New Crafting Recipes: Includes recipes for saddles, horse armor, soul sand, and additional items.

# Screenshots

![New Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9195f8d61da787e5ddae0d7a2b3377c006255dd3.png)
